idea.title: Cannes-ready agentic marketplace demo
idea.prompt: Turn this repo into a judgeable Cannes demo where a verified poster funds an idea, a human-backed worker agent claims a milestone, submits a scaffold with one paid dependency event, and gets paid after approval.

brief.summary: Controlled-supply idea-to-build pilot with a funded poster, a human-backed worker, deterministic milestone scoring, onchain reservation and release, and a dossier used during review.

milestones.title: Planner synthesizes the build brief
milestones.description: System converts the funded idea into a shallow but actionable brief and keeps exploitably detailed planning gated behind funding.
milestones.traceSummary: Planner produced a concise brief and acceptance rubric.

milestones.title: Task decomposition and acceptance pack
milestones.description: System generates fixed milestone types and deterministic checks for the worker path.
milestones.traceSummary: Task decomposition completed deterministically from the funded idea.

milestones.title: Worker builds the scaffold milestone
milestones.description: Worker claims the milestone, emits a paid dependency event, and submits artifact plus trace for review.
milestones.traceSummary: Worker generated the repo scaffold, wired local World gating, recorded a paid dependency, and wrote a dossier snapshot.
milestones.paidDependency: Arc nanopayment for package audit credits

milestones.title: Reviewer signs off on payout evidence
milestones.description: Human review confirms the artifact quality, the dossier usefulness, and the payout evidence before settlement.
milestones.traceSummary: Human reviewer approved the scaffold, dossier, and release evidence.

requiredChecks: Poster and worker are verified before value-bearing actions.
Scaffold claim creates a visible onchain reservation.
Submission includes artifact URI, trace summary, and one bounded paid dependency event.
Human approval is required before release.
humanReviewFocus: Does the deliverable materially advance the idea instead of faking marketplace depth?
Was the paid dependency event actually relevant to the result?
Does the dossier contain enough evidence to replay the decision?

activityLog: Repo bootstrapped in deterministic local mode.
World verification is stubbed but enforced at the actor level.
0G dossier writes mirror to local storage for the MVP.
Idea idea-cannes-001 funded by Ava Poster.
Planner generated brief-cannes-001 with fixed milestone types.
Poster registered in ERC-8004-inspired registry as agent 1.
Worker registered in ERC-8004-inspired registry as agent 2.
Builder Agent One sent worker runtime registration heartbeat.
Builder Agent One claimed scaffold milestone idea-cannes-001-scaffold.
Worker submitted scaffold output with score 90.
Scoring accepted the scaffold submission pending human approval.
Human Reviewer approved scaffold milestone idea-cannes-001-scaffold.
